name: codegraph
install_doc: README: `npm install -g @colbymchenry/codegraph@0.9.9` then `codegraph install --yes`; MCP entry captured verbatim from a sandboxed run of the installer (HOME + CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR redirected). Per-repo index: `codegraph init`.
notes: Local code index + knowledge graph MCP. Indexing runs per workspace in setup_commands so its cost is measured as setup_ms.
